name: title-slide
description: Evaluate and improve title slides — dark hero pattern, executive framing, visual presence
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 on executive-framed titles with governing thought, audience context, and visual presence

prompts.text: Build a title slide for a Q4 board presentation about $128M revenue exceeding plan by 8%
Build a title slide for a SaaS pitch to a Fortune 500 CTO about analytics platform
Build a title slide for a Sev-1 incident postmortem: 45 min downtime, 10K users affected
Build a title slide for an M&A strategy review on acquiring a cybersecurity startup for growth acceleration
Build a title slide for a turnaround plan after two quarters of declining margins
Build a title slide for investor day highlighting AI-led expansion and path to $500M ARR
Build a title slide for a cost transformation program targeting $50M run-rate savings
Build a title slide for an ESG update on reducing carbon emissions 40% by 2030
Build a title slide for the launch of a new enterprise security platform
Build a title slide for a post-merger integration steering committee update
